response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) expertise required for this role; his recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no clear contributions to IDE tooling, language servers, or JVM-based developer tooling.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated passion for developer tooling and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not enterprise Java ecosystems
Career gap and lack of recent Java/Kotlin project involvement raises red flags
